---
title: "Contact"
toc: false
---

## Contact

Thank you for visiting my portfolio. If you are interested in my work or would like to discuss opportunities, collaborations, or projects, please feel free to get in touch. I would be happy to connect.

::: {.contact-grid}

::: {.contact-card}

<div class="contact-icon"><i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i></div>

### Email

If you would like to get in touch, feel free to send me an email. I aim to respond promptly to all professional inquiries.

[Email me via Gmail](https://mail.google.com/mail/?view=cm&fs=1&to=torsamukhter10@gmail.com&su=Contact%20from%20Portfolio&body=Hi%20Torsa,){target="_blank"}

:::

::: {.contact-card}

<div class="contact-icon"><i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin"></i></div>

### LinkedIn

Connect with me on LinkedIn to learn more about my academic background, experience, and ongoing projects.

[View my LinkedIn profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/torsa-mukhter-5b06781aa/){target="_blank"}

:::

::: {.contact-card}

<div class="contact-icon"><i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i></div>

### GitHub

Explore my GitHub to see the code behind my projects, including data analysis, machine learning models, and visualisations.

[View my GitHub profile](https://github.com/torsamukhter){target="_blank"}

:::

:::

---

::: {.reference-box}

## References

Professional references are available upon request.

:::
